Fourteenth Account And Report Of De La Salle Institute And Petition For Settlement Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Elizabeth Cannon and Kimberly Moore appeared by zoom for De La Salle Institute (petitioner).

Ms. Cannon stated that the prior accountant didn't follow the probate format, that the matter was an extensive project, and that the foreign travel fund is currently available to students attending Sacred Heart High School. Amended Fourteenth Account and report of De La Salle Institute etc., is taken under submission to accept the accounting as amended.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.
